text:
Dark Side Of The Moon is the 6th character image song for the Attack on Titan anime. It is the character image song of Levi, and is sung by his voice actor, . It is an arrangement of the song The Reluctant Heroes.

The song was composed by both and Kohta Yamamoto, and arranged solely by Yamamoto.
